news_items.headline: Cardinals make fleury of minor league moves to open up opportunities
news_items.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals had plenty to be excited about over the past week or so. With JJ Wetherholt inking an extension and Jordan Walker making history, the draft almost took a back seat to everything else over the All-Star break. That could have been the case if it were not for the Cardinals receiving […]

news_items.headline: Blogfather Saves The Day With Pearls Of Most Excellent Advice
news_items.summary: If the A’s have a terrific second half reversing all bad trends, we will be able to look at this “unauthorized coaching” article as the springboard that vaulted the team back to relevancy. Obviously, if the team continues to sputter it’s not my fault — who reads junk on the internet anyway? The All-Star break […]
